name: Grilled Pork Loin with Mustard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pork loin chops in a freezer bag.
2. Combine 3 tablespoons of white wine vinegar, 1 tablespoon of white Worcestershire sauce, 1 tablespoon of salad oil, and 2 crushed garlic cloves in the bag with the pork chops. Seal the bag and refrigerate until ready to grill.
3. To prepare: remove the pork from the marinade and grill over barbecue or under oven broiler until well-cooked.
4. For the mustard sauce, combine 1/2 cup of sour cream and 2 tablespoons of Dijon mustard in a bowl. Chill until ready to serve.
5. Serve grilled pork loin chops with the mustard sauce on top. Optionally pair with white/wild rice, steamed broccoli, and French bread.
